output.rationale: Source updates hourly (HOURLY frequency detected). 8.5M rows with MODIFIED_DATE incremental column supports efficient upsert. Similar partner tables in the pipeline run hourly. SLA tier 2 (near-real-time, max 60min latency) is appropriate for financial commission data.

decision_log.decision: Set hourly schedule with UPSERT strategy
decision_log.rationale: Source update_frequency=HOURLY, row_count=8.5M. MODIFIED_DATE enables incremental upsert. Commission data is financial -> Tier 2 SLA minimum. Checked existing partner ingestion configs — all run hourly.

alternatives_considered.reason: Hourly is sufficient — source only updates hourly

tool_calls.input: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', MODIFIED_DATE), COUNT(*) FROM ECOMM.DBO.PARTNER_COMMISSION WHERE MODIFIED_DATE >= DATEADD('day', -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 24
